'''''Trucemaker''''' was a ship in the [[Fourth Fleet (Galactic Alliance)|Galactic Alliance Fourth Fleet]] as of [[40 ABY/Legends|40 ABY]].

==History==
''Trucemaker'' was the [[Flagship/Legends|flagship]] of [[Rear Admiral/Legends|Rear Admiral]] [[Gavin Darklighter]], and when [[Admiral/Legends|Admiral]] [[Ratobo]] was killed and his flagship ''[[Peacebringer]]'' destroyed at the [[Second Battle of Balmorra]], it became the flagship of the Fourth when Darklighter assumed command. It was presumably also present when Darklighter and the Fourth again [[Battle of Kuat (Second Galactic Civil War)|faced]] the [[Confederation Fleet]] at [[Kuat/Legends|Kuat]] shortly thereafter.

==Appearances==
*''[[Legacy of the Force: Inferno]]'' {{1st}}
